response.overview: This tape was found, to no surprise, in the security office. When switching over to the dayshift, an employee couldn't find the night guard anywhere in the building; until they checked the backroom. The guard had been forcefully shoved into one of the spare costumes we had in the back. Fazbear entertainment didn't want to make a scene, and so the backroom was locked off from all employees until closing, where the company could discreetly dispose of the body; this wouldn't be their first time doing this either.
response.tagline: A Five Nights at Freddy's film
response.title: Bonnie
